unwrapAntimeridianRing

On this page
Table of Contents for current page

webdggrid / unwrapAntimeridianRing

Function: unwrapAntimeridianRing() ​

unwrapAntimeridianRing(ring): Position[]

Defined in: webdggrid.ts:156

Rewraps a polygon ring that crosses the antimeridian so that all longitudes are in a contiguous range (some may exceed 180°). This is the format expected by MapLibre GL / Mapbox GL globe projection for antimeridian cells. For renderers that require standard [-180, 180] coordinates, use the raw output from Webdggrid.sequenceNumToGrid directly.

Parameters ​

ring ​

Position[]

Returns ​

Position[]
